rawContent: Task: 2223-260413-211041 | Outcome: running | Observation: Task 2223-260413-211041 (add retryWithBackoff utility to src/utils/retry.ts) ran in rerun mode and completed all stages (build ~4185 tokens, review ~5110 tokens, review-fix ~3897 tokens, ship) despite verify stage reporting FAIL with TS2344 type constraint violations in PagesPageConfig. This is the twentieth consecutive run exhibiting the verify-to-ship gate flaw documented in all prior retrospectives, now in rerun mode. Additionally, this run shows a new variation: the build stage failed with exit code 1 due to MCP configuration issues (previously only verify was failing). The build stage exited with code 1 but produced no diagnostic output explaining the configuration schema, leaving the root cause opaque. The ship stage updated PR #843 despite verify reporting FAIL, continuing the pattern of the pipeline shipping code that failed typecheck validation. | Pattern: Twentieth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, 874, 260409-215133, 260409-220738, 260409-221218, 260409-222402, 260412-140927, 260412-141225, 2223-260413-211041) exhibiting the verify-to-ship gate flaw where verify stage FAIL does not prevent pipeline progression to ship. Additionally, this run adds a new failure mode: build stage MCP configuration validation failure with exit code 1 and no diagnostic output. | Suggestion: Add MCP configuration schema validation with a diagnostic message in the build stage — when mcpServers.github or mcpServers.filesystem fail validation, output the expected schema format rather than exiting silently with code 1. Also implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Flaw: build — MCP server configuration validation failure produces exit code 1 with no diagnostic output explaining the expected schema format | Stages: taskify:pending, plan:pending, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
